title: AxoHologram
description: AxoHologram is a modern hologram plugin for Paper servers that uses Display Entities
body:
# AxoHologram

AxoHologram is a modern hologram plugin for Paper servers that uses **Display Entities**, providing dynamic, interactive, and highly optimized holograms without relying on traditional entities.

It is designed to deliver high performance, flexibility, and an advanced per-player visual experience.

---
## ✨ Features

* 📝 Advanced text, item, and block holograms
* ⚡ Built using modern Minecraft Display Entities
* 🖼️ Image holograms with map-based rendering
* 🎬 Video holograms with playback controls
* ▶️ Play, pause, and stop video holograms
* 📐 Resize and scale image/video holograms with commands
* 🎯 Improved media centering based on image/video size
* 📖 Multi-page hologram system
* 🎨 Full support for MiniMessage, HEX, RGB, gradients, and legacy colors
* ✨ Configurable text and display animations
* 👁️ Multiple visibility modes per hologram
* 🔒 Permission-based hologram visibility
* 🖱️ Clickable hologram actions and interactions
* 🧩 PlaceholderAPI and MiniPlaceholders support
* 🧠 Smart rendering optimizations for better performance
* 📥 Hologram import and conversion system
* 🔄 Support for importing FancyHolograms, DecentHolograms, and GHolo holograms
* 🤖 Optional NPC-linked holograms
* 💾 Backup system for hologram data and media
* 📦 Async media downloading, processing, caching, and thumbnail generation
* 🌍 Multi-language ready
* ⚙️ Fully configurable through YAML
---

## 📦 Requirements

- ☕ Java 25+
- 📄 Paper 1.21.4+ / API 26.1+
- 🌿 Folia compatible

---

## 🔌 Optional Plugins

- PlaceholderAPI
- MiniPlaceholders
- FancyNPCs
